deletedBanner.title: Event deleted
deletedBanner.description: This event was deleted by the organizer. It is shown in read-only mode for audit purposes.

errors.forbidden: You are not authorized to view this event.
errors.generic: We couldn’t load the event. Please try again.

panel.title: Review moderation panel
panel.subtitle: Filter reviews by status, vendor, dates and rating; moderate in one click.
panel.error: We couldn't load the reviews. Please try again.
panel.empty: No reviews match the current filters.
panel.caption: Admin reviews (full PII + last moderation action).

filters.errorRatingRange: Minimum rating must be less than or equal to maximum.
filters.errorDateRange: Start date must be less than or equal to end date.

table.title: Review moderation
table.subtitle: Hide or remove reviews with an auditable reason.
table.promptSelectVendor: Enter a vendor ID to load its reviews.
table.error: We couldn’t load the reviews. Please try again.
table.empty: No reviews match the current filter.
table.caption: Vendor reviews with moderation actions.

dialog.title: Moderate review
dialog.finalRemovedNotice: This review is already removed. No further transition is allowed.

errors.unauthenticated: You need to sign in as an admin.
errors.invalidTransition: That transition is not allowed for the current status.

panel.title: Vendor moderation panel
panel.subtitle: Filter vendors by status, visibility, dates and name; moderate with a click.
panel.error: We couldn't load vendors. Please try again.
panel.empty: No vendors match the current filters.
panel.caption: Admin vendors (full PII + last moderation action).

filters.errorDateRange: The start date must be before or equal to the end date.

dialog.title: Moderate "{businessName}"
dialog.finalNotice: This vendor is rejected. No further transitions allowed in the MVP.

errors.unauthenticated: You need to sign in as an admin.
errors.invalidTransition: That transition is not allowed for the current status.

panel.title: Service categories panel
panel.subtitle: Manage the service catalog (2-level hierarchy, i18n and soft delete).
panel.error: We couldn't load the catalog. Please try again.

tree.empty: No categories yet. Create the first one to start.
tree.countLabel: {count, plural, one {1 category} other {# categories}} in the catalog.

form.codeInvalid: Only lowercase letters, digits, and dashes (slug format).

delete.title: Deactivate {name}
delete.description: The category will be marked inactive; it is not physically deleted to preserve traceability.

errors.unauthenticated: You need to sign in as an admin.
errors.forbidden: Only admins can manage the catalog.
errors.hierarchyDepth: You can't create level-3 categories: the max depth is 2.
errors.duplicateCode: The code already exists. Pick a unique one.
errors.categoryInUse: Cannot deactivate: there are vendors with services in this category.
errors.categoryHasChildren: Cannot deactivate: it has active subcategories. Deactivate them first.
errors.invalidParent: The parent category does not exist.
errors.reasonRequired: You must provide a reason to deactivate.
errors.reasonLength: Reason must be between 10 and 500 characters.

panel.title: Event types catalog
panel.subtitle: Manage event types (weddings, quinceañeras, baptisms, corporate…). Soft delete is blocked when events already reference the type.
panel.error: We couldn't load the catalog. Please try again.

table.empty: No event types yet. Create the first one to begin.
table.countLabel: {count, plural, one {1 type} other {# types}} in the catalog.

form.codeInvalid: Lowercase letters, digits, dashes and underscores only.

delete.title: Deactivate {name}
delete.description: It will be marked as inactive; it is not deleted physically to preserve historical event traceability.

errors.unauthenticated: You need to sign in as an admin.
errors.forbidden: Only admins can manage the catalog.
errors.notFound: The event type no longer exists.
errors.duplicateCode: The code already exists. Pick a unique one.
errors.eventTypeInUse: Cannot deactivate: there are events associated with this type.
errors.reasonRequired: You must provide a reason to deactivate.
errors.reasonLength: Reason must be between 10 and 500 characters.
